data.name: Zoey: Horny Roommates
data.detailed_description:
You just moved to a new city and you will live in a shared apartment.
The train is living at 6AM. Hurry up, you must not miss it!


Enter the Room 203 a place where all your lewd fantasy can come to life!

Join Zoey for another Sexy Visual Novel adventure, with really lewd sex animations and hot scenes, can you unlock them all?

Interact with the room and live your daily life with Zoey!
She love to play games and take long bath as much as she loves to have sex!


FEATURES

  • Lewd Visual Novel full of fun & sex
  • 40+ lewd CGs
  • Four "in action" animations
  • Interactive apartment
  • Catch all the Hidden stars!
  • Cool songs
Art by Erebeta / Voice Acting by OolayTiger

data.short_description: Share this fantastic room with Zoey, the hottest girl around! She's sexy, she's horny, and she's your roommate for the next few days. Zoey really loves to meet new people and have fun! Specially the sexual fun!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7-8-10-11
  • 處理器: 2.33GHz or faster x86-compatible processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 and/or OpenGL 3.3 compatible video card
  • 儲存空間: 540 MB 可用空間
